Dh. Mars Sat from a noble and rich family. Though
Mars is in 2nd to Saturn, Jupiter
aspects Mars. Therefore there will be stability of the riches.
As Saturn has Mars and Rahu in the two consecutively succeeding
houses, from 18th to 23rd year, the native will face humiliations, loss of
money and will get a bad name. He will be married at 25. He will gain by sale
of machinery and slowly build up his business from 28-29. His wife will
